lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: jake_how_much_knows = 1 - nothing, 2 - told about david, 3 - 2+the david plan, 4 - 3+computer superpower

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Hey dude.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Havent seen you around lately.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah, Ive been busy durring the weekend.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Something new at school?

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Nothing much. Lisa is still innocent. Bone is still Bone and Tony still keeps to himself.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: And Candy is still...Candy.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: When are you gonna ask her out to the dance?

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Probably never.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Hey tough guy! Do you have a partner lined up?

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Thats what I thought.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Anyway, Jake!

choices.text: Damn the teacher was really drilling you there huh?
You know of a place I could buy a camera at?
You know of a place I could buy a camera at?
You know of a place I could buy a camera at?
Jake I have something I have to tell you (tell him about the computer superpower)
Jake I have something I have to tell you (tell him about David)
Jake I have something I have to tell you (tell him about David and the plan)
Jake can you spot me a couple bucks?
Wanna watch a movie in the evening?

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: See you around.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Man dont even start. She relishes in this.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Haha you should have paid attention last lesson.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Oh youre the one to speak huh?

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: If I remember correctly yours went about the same last time.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: At least I didnt end up like Boniface usually does.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Too true.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: You cant do much when the teacher already dislikes you from day one.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Wonder what the reason could be..

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Youre threading on thin ice here. If she heard you, youd end up like him just so she proves you wrong.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Its wrong. And one day shell gets what she deserves for it.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Its a shame because I feel like shes a pretty good teacher. Well..compared to other teachers here.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: It is what it is.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: You asking because of the thing?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: yeah.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Well its not gonna be cheap but theres is a store in town. You might have seen it. its basically on the opposite side to where school is.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: what are the prices?

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Dont know the exact numbers but its in the hundred at least for a decent one that can last longer.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Well long lasting is what we need.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: How is David?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Why dont you go ask him?

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Ehh..I-

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: You dont wanna be seen with a loser?

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: NO!

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: What is it then?

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: I dont think like that!

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: What is it then?

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: I dont know.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Well you clearly care so go ask. He would really apreciate it.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Okay ill ask.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Hmmm. Why you asking?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Because I need one. And I dont want to explain right now.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Sure, alright.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Theres a store, next to the river on the opsite side of town. But theyre not cheap. Just a warning.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Whats the price? A couple hundred?

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: For a midrange yeah. You could go cheaper though.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I need one that has a good battery. A couple hours at least.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Yeah thats gonna be a couple hundred for sure.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Welp. Can i uhh..

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Sorry dude I dont have any money. I would give you what I have but at least tell me what its for.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah..

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: What for?

choices.text: For the camera im trying to buy.
I forgot to pack lunch today. I wanna buy something from the vending machine.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Oh...sure. Could not look at myself in the mirror if I didnt.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Thanks. Ill mention to David that you helped.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Jake gives you 20 dollars.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Dude, why does this happen so often?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: It doesnt!

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Last week you also 'forgot your lunch at home'.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Pleaseee spot a friend.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Okay. But its the last time.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Jake gives you 5 dollars.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Sure, dude. Which one?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I saw they were screening The matrix in the cinema.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Ive seen that one already.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Damn, fine. Then well see what next week maybe?

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: What about at your place?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: We could. But Ill have to ask dad..

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Well ask dad and you can tell me tomorrow or something

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: yeah.

I have already talked to David about a plan
